_: Per-beach xstream client settings. Overrides built-in kernel defaults at the per-beach layer; per-user shell:5 settings override further. Walk by dot-spindle within this block (e.g. resolveSetting('1.2') reads vapour_debounce_ms). Empty = client uses built-in defaults. To override a knob, write a number (or matching primitive) at the leaf address described below.

1._: vapour_staleness_ms — when peer vapour text is treated as gone. Built-in default 30000. Set a number here to override.

2._: vapour_debounce_ms — keystroke broadcast throttle. Built-in default 80. Set a number here to override.

1._: liquid_staleness_ms — when staged liquid ages out (advisory currently). Built-in default 60000.
presence_staleness_ms — when peer presence is treated as gone. Built-in default 30000.
inbox_watch_every_cycles — scan watched beaches every Nth cycle. Built-in default 5.

5._: Recipe overrides at (tier, face). Walk via 5.<tier>.<face>: tier digits 1=soft, 2=medium, 3=hard; face digits 1=character, 2=author, 3=designer, 4=observer. Each leaf is the recipe JSON; absent = client uses built-in default recipe for that (tier, face) combination.
